title: CozyHaven: SMP EDITION
description: Welcome to the exclusive CozyHaven: SMP Edition modpack, crafted for the ultimate cozy multiplayer experience! Explore enchanting landscapes, gather charming building blocks, and create your dream haven with friends in a world designed just for you.
body:
```
WE ARE NO LONGER UPDATING OR GIVING SUPPORT FOR COZYHAVEN DUE TO A NEW MODPACK ON THE HORIZON 👀
```
## 🍂Dive into the ULTIMATE cozy adventure with CozyHaven: SMP EDITION!🍂

🧸This thoughtfully crafted modpack elevates your Minecraft journey with stunning aesthetics, practical features, and limitless exploration. Whether you're adventuring solo or teaming up with friends, this pack delivers the ideal mix of creativity, performance, and enjoyment.🧸

## Why SMP?
- **Tailored Experience:** Every mod and tweak has been carefully chosen to enhance your multiplayer experience on the CozyHaven SMP, ensuring optimal performance and fun while exploring new realms and collaborating with friends.
- **Community Focus:** This edition emphasizes cooperative gameplay, where building, exploration, and adventure are best enjoyed with a vibrant community.

## For the Singleplayer Enthusiasts
While **CozyHaven: SMP EDITION** is optimized for multiplayer fun, it’s not intended as a full singleplayer experience. If you're looking to dive into a more feature-rich, expansive solo adventure, consider downloading the original CozyHaven pack available on Modrinth. The original pack comes loaded with additional features and tweaks specifically designed for singleplayer enjoyment. 👉 [Download the Original CozyHaven Pack on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cozyhaven)

## Join the Adventure
Prepare to explore, build, and thrive in a world where creativity meets performance. Whether you're teaming up with friends or taking on the challenges of the SMP world, CozyHaven SMP EDITION invites you to experience Minecraft like never before. Happy crafting and see you in the game! 🌟🔮

☁️ Powered Visuals by [Complimentary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
